title: Part-Time Dessert & Pastry Chef / Pastry Cook
description:
🧁 Part-Time Dessert & Pastry Chef / Pastry Cook

We’re looking for a passionate and detail-oriented Part-Time Pastry Chef / Pastry Cook to join our team at Arc-en-ciel Pâtisserie — a dessert destination along Neil Road known for our elegant ice cream parfaits, wines, and tea-based mocktails and cocktails.

If you take pride in your craft, love working with precision, and find joy in creating desserts that bring smiles, we’d love for you to join our rainbow family.


🌈 Your Role

As a Part-Time Pastry Chef, you’ll work closely with our chef-owner and full-time pastry team to produce beautiful, consistent desserts that reflect our signature quality.


Responsibilities:

  • Work closely with the chef-owner on daily production, preparation, and plating of pastries and parfaits.
  • Maintain a clean, organised workstation and ensure proper upkeep of tools and equipment.
  • Execute assigned tasks independently with consistency, precision, and care.
  • Complete prep and mise-en-place efficiently and within allocated timeframes.
  • Foster strong teamwork and communication with fellow team members.
  • Support stock receiving, inventory checks, and storage organisation.
  • Opportunity to contribute ideas to new menu development and creative R&D.

🌟 What We’re Looking For

  • 💼 Experience: Minimum 1 year of pastry, gelato, or cake shop experience preferred (not compulsory — we train the right fit!).
  • 🎂 Skills: Strong attention to detail, good time management, and familiarity with standard pastry techniques.
  • 🧠 Mindset: Responsible, adaptable, and passionate about learning and improving.
  • 📅 Commitment: Able to commit for at least 3 months and work evening and weekend shifts.
  • ⏰ Hours: Up to 30 hours per week, with flexibility to extend during busy periods.
  • 🇸🇬 Eligibility: Open to Singaporeans and PRs only.

🌟 Why Join Us

  • Capped 30-hour work week for greater flexibility and a healthier work-life balance.
  • Full workplace insurance coverage for peace of mind.
  • Supportive environment with hands-on learning, guidance, and mentorship.
  • Creative growth: Space to experiment, contribute ideas, and develop your skills in the pastry world.
  • Be part of a team that believes desserts can bring real joy and big smiles to every guest.

Ready to make magic with us?
Send in your application and be part of our journey to spread happiness — one dessert at a time.

postedCompany.description:
Arc-en-ciel Pâtisserie is a dessert destination housed in a charming heritage shophouse along Neil Road, known for our Japanese and French–inspired creations that blend artistry, flavour, and joy. “Arc-en-ciel” means “rainbow” in French — a name that reflects our mission: to bring instant smiles and moments of happiness through the desserts we create.

We specialise in elegant ice cream parfaits, thoughtfully paired with boutique wines and tea-based mocktails and cocktails, offering a unique and elevated dessert experience unlike any other in Singapore. Every creation is designed to surprise, delight, and spark joy — because we believe dessert should be more than a treat; it should be an experience.

At Arc-en-ciel, we’re a small, passionate team that values creativity, curiosity, and genuine hospitality. We care deeply about making people happy through what we do, and we’re looking for like-minded individuals who want to grow with us and be part of our journey to spread smiles, one sweet bite at a time.
postedCompany.name: ARC-EN-CIEL DE REVES PTE. LTD.
